Class PiratesRewardState

java.lang.Object
Controller.State
Controller.Pirates.PiratesRewardState
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PiratesRewardState extends State
Handles the reward phase after the pirate attack.

In this state, players who won against the pirate attack have the opportunity to claim a reward or skip it. After they have responded, the game proceeds either to the cannon shot phase (if someone else before lost) or returns to the main flight phase.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PiratesRewardState

      public PiratesRewardState(Context context)

  • Method Details

    • getReward

      public void getReward(String playerName, RewardType rewardType) throws InvalidMethodParameters, InvalidParameters
      Grants a reward to the player if eligible.

      Only players who are not first in the turn order can receive rewards. The only available reward type is CREDITS. After receiving the reward, the player is removed from the player list. Once all the players before are handled, the game transitions accordingly.

      Overrides:
      getReward in class State
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player claiming the reward
      rewardType - the type of reward the player wants (only CREDITS is valid)
      Throws:
      InvalidMethodParameters
      InvalidParameters

    • skipReward

      public void skipReward(String playerName) throws InvalidParameters
      Allows the player to skip the reward.

      The player is removed from the reward list without receiving any reward. Then the game transitions to the next appropriate state.

      Overrides:
      skipReward in class State
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player skipping the reward
      Throws:
      InvalidParameters

    • getAvailableCommands

      public List<String> getAvailableCommands()
